name: Vigo, Moneygram, Order Expres
description_short: MoneyGram agent location at Order Express offering money transfer, bill payment, and cash services with extended Saturday hours in Los Angeles.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates through a network of agent locations, including this Order Express branch in Los Angeles' downtown area. This is not an independent check-cashing company but rather an authorized MoneyGram agent location that provides access to MoneyGram's global money transfer and financial services platform. The location functions as a physical point of service for customers who prefer in-person transactions over online channels.

At this Order Express location, customers can send and receive money domestically and internationally through MoneyGram's established transfer network. The location also appears to support bill payment services and other cash-related financial transactions. All cash-related services require customers to present a valid legal form of identification, consistent with federal anti-money laundering regulations and know-your-customer requirements. The store operates extended hours during the week and maintains weekend availability.

As an agent location, Order Express provides convenience through physical accessibility rather than proprietary innovation. Customers can conduct transactions in person, which may appeal to those who prefer face-to-face service or lack reliable digital access. The downtown Los Angeles location serves a high-density urban area with diverse immigrant and low-to-moderate-income populations who frequently rely on money transfer services for family support and bill payment.

The primary limitation is that this location's services are determined entirely by MoneyGram's offerings and pricing—customers receive no specialized advantage over any other MoneyGram agent location. The website content does not specify exact service fees, transfer limits, or delivery timeframes, requiring customers to contact the location directly. Hours may vary, and weekend Sunday hours appear incomplete or potentially erroneous in the listing (12:00 AM - 12:00 AM).
address: Order Express- Ca110, 1251 E Olympic Blvd Unit 105, Los Angeles, CA 90021

company_info.headquarters: Order Express- Ca110, 1251 E Olympic Blvd Unit 105, Los Angeles, CA 90021

pros: Extended weekday hours (7 AM opening) accommodate early-morning errands before work
Saturday morning availability (8 AM - 2 PM) serves weekend-only availability customers
In-person service for customers uncomfortable with digital money transfers
Located in downtown Los Angeles at accessible street address (1251 E Olympic Blvd)
Direct phone contact available (213-629-6993) for transaction questions before visiting
Legal ID requirement enforces security and prevents fraud
Integrated with MoneyGram's global money transfer network for both sending and receiving
cons: No information provided on transfer fees, exchange rates, or service costs on the location page
Limited to MoneyGram's service offerings—no additional or competitive services beyond MoneyGram product line
Weekend hours appear incomplete (Sunday hours listed as 12:00 AM - 12:00 AM, likely a system error)
No online appointment scheduling or wait-time information available
Friday closes at 6 PM (earlier than weekday standard), limiting late-afternoon access
best_for: Immigrants and migrant workers sending money internationally to family members
Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing in-person money transfer services
Downtown Los Angeles residents without reliable digital devices or internet access
Customers preferring same-day in-person service over online transfer platforms
diagnosis: This location is best for customers in the Los Angeles area who need in-person money transfer or bill payment services and prefer face-to-face interaction. The main caveat is that this is an agent location with no independent services—all offerings, fees, and limitations are determined by MoneyGram corporate, making comparison shopping essential before visiting.
services: Domestic money transfers via MoneyGram network
Walk-in service with no appointment required
Multiple language customer support (implied by MoneyGram's service model)
In-person transaction processing with ID verification
